calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-03-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Mikalai Hroshau, Esq., appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant /Cross-complainant Alexandra Schwartz, also present.
Respondent/Plaintiff/Cross-defendant Alexander Yevelev appeared on his own behalf.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses for Respondent, Paul Totterdell and Rachel Malchow, are sworn. Parties stipulated to a Judge Pro Tem.
Respondent/Plaintiff/Cross-defendant Alexander Yevelev testifies on his own behalf.
Paul Totterdell and Rachel Malchow testify on behalf of Respondent Alexander Yevelev.
Appellant/Defendant /Cross-complainant Alexandra Schwartz testifies on her own behalf.
Appellant/Defendant /Cross-complainant Alexandra Schwartz files a trial brief.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent's Exhibit A - Binder of documents including Timeline of Events, Architect's proposals, emails between the parties.
Appellant's Exhibit 1 - Group exhibit of documents including invoice from Alexandra Schwartz, fee ranges, and emails between the parties.
Respondent and Appellant's exhibits retained.
At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
Dept. 525; Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.
